overall.description: Aerial footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a teal flying transport vehicle cruising over a cyberpunk city edge, red badlands, and an industrial complex during golden hour sunset. The camera smoothly tracks the vehicle as it flies past neon-lit buildings, a communication tower, and smokestack-filled factories.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city edge with neon signage overlooking red badlands

events.description: aerial view opens showing cyberpunk cityscape and flying vehicle
camera begins smooth tracking movement following the flying vehicle

agents.ego_description: operating a drone camera to track the flying transport vehicle from an aerial perspective

notable_agents.action: teal flying transport vehicle hovering near the city buildings

entered.detail: tall buildings with bright neon signage including green SOLAR sign and Japanese characters
tall lattice tower with antenna array
rugged reddish-brown rocky landscape with winding roads below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a teal flying transport vehicle hovering near a cyberpunk city edge. Neon-lit buildings with Japanese signage occupy the right side while a tall communication tower stands prominently against the golden hour sky. Below, the red badlands terrain stretches into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between badlands and industrial mining complex

events.description: city buildings exit view as industrial structures come into sight on the left
industrial smokestacks become clearly visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to track the flying vehicle as it moves away from the city toward industrial zones

notable_agents.action: flying transport vehicle moving steadily over the badlands

entered.detail: tall factory chimneys beginning to appear on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicle moves away from the cyberpunk city, passing the communication tower which falls behind. The landscape transitions to open badlands as industrial smokestacks and factory structures begin to emerge on the left horizon, signaling the approach to an industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial complex with active smokestacks at sunset

events.description: sun becomes visible on the left horizon creating strong golden hour backlighting
smoke plumes from stacks become prominent against the sunset sky

agents.ego_description: tracking the flying vehicle as it cruises past the industrial smokestacks

notable_agents.action: cruising past industrial smokestacks with the setting sun in the background

entered.detail: bright sun low on the horizon creating golden hour lighting and lens flare
white and orange smoke billowing from factory chimneys

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the flying vehicle cruising over a massive industrial complex with multiple active smokestacks emitting plumes into the golden hour sky. The setting sun on the left creates a warm backlight, illuminating the smoke and industrial structures while the vehicle maintains its steady flight path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial camera movement that tracks a teal transport vehicle as it transitions from a neon-lit city edge into a sprawling industrial wasteland. It begins with the vehicle hovering near cyberpunk buildings adorned with Japanese signage and a towering communication mast against a golden hour sky. As the vehicle moves forward, the city and tower recede, giving way to the open expanse of red badlands where industrial smokestacks first appear on the distant horizon. The scene then expands into a massive industrial complex, with the camera gliding over active factories emitting plumes of smoke. Finally, the setting sun shifts to the left, casting a warm backlight across the industrial structures as the vehicle maintains its steady flight path.
